expertAssessments.rationale: Focused production QA covered today’s AI artifact transform and quick-start changes plus DB threshold regression. Core behavior passed; one non-blocking embedded tab copy alignment gap remains.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Align AI_WORKSPACE_FUNCTION_TABS descriptions with the sharpened navigation copy if the embedded route is intended to expose the same UX.

expertAssessments.rationale: Playwright MCP transport was unavailable and the temporary Playwright CLI spec initially produced a full-log false-negative for DB. Durable transcript and screenshots preserved the product evidence, but the temporary spec should not be promoted as-is.
expertAssessments.nextAction: If this scenario becomes recurring, add a stable message-segment helper for AI E2E transcript assertions.

wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

notes: Direct Playwright MCP transport failed with Transport closed; stale @playwright/mcp processes were killed and retried, but the transport remained unavailable.
Playwright CLI fallback ran against https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app production, version v8.12.15 commit f7a16aab73c1d17c96af7a02b668866ad3637616.
Raw runner assertion was corrected for DB by isolating the DB query segment in qa-20260523-0569-ai-transcript.txt; the product response itself excluded db-mysql-dc1-replica 40%.
